title: Quran, Sura 51: Adh-Dhariyat
description: Sura 51 (Adh-Dhariyat: The Winnowing Winds) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 51 (Adh-Dhariyat: The Winnowing Winds) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: By those winds scattering dust, carrying a load of moisture, and those ships sailing with ease, and those angels distributing each matter.
